calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Dec-24-2007 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up.
Off Calendar Nov-15-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, VJ: Ollie Marie-victoire, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Helen Sorep-Matley.
Edward Smith, Esq. for Plaintiff: Lawrence K. Rogers.
Order waiving live testimony is in file.
After hearing and considering of the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendant: Thomas Dee engineering Co., Inc., as follows:
Post-judgment Interest $1,625.95
Costs $209.80, for a total of $1,835.75
Judgment signed in open court.

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Reclasify Unlimited Civil Case To Limited Civil Case
Off Calendar Nov-05-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF LAWRENCE ROGERS Motion To Reclasify Unlimited Civil Case To Limited Civil Case.
APPEARANCES: Leah F. Baccitich, Esq. of Brayton Purcell, LLP 898-1555 for pltf & moving party; no other appearances.
RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling - GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. Order signed in open court. (302/PJM) JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR #8600
